content.en:
"Let's go to the immeasurable time and space to cultivate first!"

Ye Tian decided.

With his talent, he felt that he should have the hope of attaining the Infinite Dao cultivation to the realm of Xiaocheng or more in the ten trillion Origin Realm eras.

But to what extent he could be elevated, he couldn't be sure.

Afterwards, Ye Tian went to the immeasurable time and space.

Before entering the immeasurable time and space, the Peerless Dao Ancestor who was guarding the Nine-Story Building reminded Ye Tian: "Endless Dao Ancestor, when you enter the immeasurable time and space to cultivate, you must do your best to restrain your breath and don't leak your breath. The aura of the Ninefold Ancestor is too powerful, and the Infinite Time and Space should have collapsed a long time ago, and the Nine-Fold Building has been maintaining, so if you want to leak the breath, it will bring an unimaginable burden to the Infinite Time and Space!"

"I understand!"

Ye Tianying said.

Then, Ye Tian reined in his breath with all his strength, and then entered the immeasurable time and space.

As soon as he entered the immeasurable space-time, Ye Tian saw the dense cracks in the immeasurable space-time, and the entire space-time seemed to be about to be shattered.

"Sure enough, this piece of time and space is about to be overwhelmed, and only the Nine-Story Building can maintain such a time and space!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he found a random spot and began to practice enlightenment.

Here, apart from him, there were also some Ninefold Ancestors, and everyone practiced quietly and did not do anything else.

Ye Tian also quietly comprehended the immeasurable way.

As soon as he attained enlightenment, he found that immeasurable time and space were too helpful for contemplating the immeasurable path, and the effect of his enlightenment here was too good.

"No wonder the Nine-Story Building has to maintain an infinite amount of time and space at all costs, this is simply an incredible treasure land!"

Ye Tian secretly exclaimed.

As the years passed, Ye Tian continued to comprehend the Immeasurable Dao here, and there was naturally no limit to other replicating bodies, if the life level should be improved, the life level should be improved, and the immeasurable will should be refined, and the division of labor and cooperation could be improved, so that the strength could be improved faster.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of billions of primordial era years have passed.

On this day, Ye Tian's Immeasurable Dao was still in the introductory stage, but his life level was about to break through.

In these years, Ye Tian has also continued to collect resources that can improve his life level, and even sneaked into the Truncated Forbidden Zone, although he did not enter the Truncated Source Sea, but he used his duplicate body to collect resources in the Truncated Forbidden Zone, and he also collected a lot of treasures suitable for improving his life level.

He used these resources to finally break the boundary of 100 life levels.

An ordinary Ninefold Origin Ancestor would not be able to break this boundary at all, but he had reached the 9.9 life level when he was a half-step Sevenfold Ancestor, so this boundary could be broken for him.

Rumble!!!!

The life level was broken, Ye Tian's life level reached 101, and he seemed to underestimate the transformation brought about by the life level breaking through 100.

The difference between 100 life level and 101 life level seems to be only a little different, but in fact, the gap is too big!

In the past, although Ye Tian knew that above the 100 life level, every improvement was a huge improvement, but he didn't really feel it, but now he felt it.

This moment.

Ye Tian's body continued to transform, and the improvement of his life level not only made his life energy skyrocket, but also made his physical body much stronger.

It was a long time before he truly completed his transformation.

"The life level has been raised to 101, which has directly increased my strength by at least eighty percent!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently, he went to the Qi Blood Heavenly Tower again to test his combat effectiveness, but he still did not break through the third layer, but he almost broke through.

In other words, as long as his strength increased a little more, he could rank in the third tier of the Ninefold Ancestor.

"According to my inference, if I want to rank in the third rank of the Ninefold Ancestor, if the Immeasurable Will reaches 50 scales, or the life level is raised to 102, or the Immeasurable Dao is raised to the Xiaocheng realm. "

Ye Tian muttered.

And among these three aspects, the easiest should be immeasurable will.

Because during this period of time, his immeasurable will has been improved again, reaching 43 scales, although it is a little difficult to improve, but if he can dive into the Truncated Source Sea and find that kind of black liquid, he can quickly improve his immeasurable will.

It's just that with his current cultivation of the Ninefold Ancestor, it is easy to be found by sneaking into the Truncated Source Sea, unless the jellyfish and the Soul Elder who have cut off the forbidden area leave the Truncated Source Sea.

However, he had no way of confirming the news.

"Unless you blend in with the high-rise of the Cut Off Zone!"

Ye Tian thought.

Abrupt.

He had an idea, he seemed to really be able to blend in with the high-level of the Cut Off Zone!

Previously, although he copied the creatures that cut off the forbidden area, he copied all the weak creatures, which had no status and would not attract much attention.

But if he copied a creature with good potential, and with his talent, he could definitely easily create a transformation level with extremely high strength and potential.

When the time comes, he will definitely be able to enter the high-level circle that cuts off the forbidden area, and will it be easier to collect resources at that time?

Although the Truncated Forbidden Zone is small, it has a lot of resources, otherwise there would be no way to give birth to so many supreme enhancements.

"Just do it, the chances of being found are close to zero!"

So, Ye Tian began to choose targets.

Pick and choose, Ye Tian felt that it was better to break the soul red beast.

After all, among the Soul Splitting Red Beasts, there is a soul elder who can be called the strongest to the level of strengthening in the Truncated Forbidden Zone, and at least there is a big backer!

Moreover, the Soul Splitting Red Beast clan is only one to the enhanced substance level, and the number of other chemical levels is also small, so he is easy to be taken seriously, unlike other races that have cut off the forbidden area, even if he really becomes a chemical level, he may not be taken seriously.

Immediately, Ye Tian copied a Soul Splitting Red Beast that had just been born, killed it and replaced it.

However, Ye Tian integrated the Nine Gates Yuan Dao Ancestral Fu into the body of this Soul Splitting Red Beast, and then cultivated with the body of this Soul Splitting Red Beast to continuously improve his life level and soul.

Although the path of cultivation is different, the path can be used for reference.

Under Ye Tian's control, this Soul Splitting Red Beast Replica Body grew rapidly, and in just 10 billion Origin Domain Era, this Soul Splitting Red Beast Replica Body had grown to the peak realm of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor.

The Soul Splitting Red Beasts do not follow the path of cultivators, they only need to let the bloodline transform three times to become a half-step transformation level comparable to the half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestor level, and the bloodline transformation nine times is the Ninefold Origin Ancestor.

And Ye Tian found that with the help of the Immeasurable Dao, he could accelerate this bloodline transformation.

As a result, Ye Tian began to use the Immeasurable Dao to accelerate the transformation of the bloodline, and tried to create a bloodline transformation technique.

For this reason, Ye Tian let this Soul Splitting Red Beast body die countless times, and went through countless experiments before finally creating it.

With this bloodline transformation technique, Ye Tian easily completed three bloodline transformations and advanced to the half-step transformation level.

And Ye Tian's advanced half-step transformation level attracted the attention of those transformation level of the Soul Splitting Red Beast Clan, after all, Ye Tian's growth speed was too terrifying!
